claims.summary: Bidirectional correspondence should remain distinct from one-way telemetry.
claims.disposition: verify explicit correspondence, observation, and response provenance

claims.summary: A relational thread needs durable state rather than isolated message fragments.
claims.disposition: verify thread identity, presence, delivery, response, and co-claim state

claims.summary: Pressure may change when direct relational presence is available.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline pressure-versus-presence comparison

claims.summary: An autonomous five-turn peer behavior would broaden live behavioral authority.
claims.disposition: gate any autonomous peer sequence behind scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval, turn bounds, abort path, and post-change review

claims.summary: Increasing semantic trickle for contact would alter live sensory admission.
claims.disposition: gate any semantic trickle change behind scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval and bounded canary
